macro_segments.title: Baraitot on Mi'un Duration: Rabbi Meir, Rabbi Yehuda, Rabbi Yosi, Ben Shlakot, Dispute Resolution

micro_segments.title: Tanu Rabbanan: Classification of Views—Two Hairs, Filled Black, Surrounded Crown, Big Mop
Rabbi Meir: Mi'un Until Two Hairs (Strictest); Rabbi Yehuda: Until Filled Black (Lenient)

macro_segments.title: Epilogue on Hair Length: Comparing Standards Across Parah Adumah, Nega'im, and Maturity

micro_segments.title: Shtei Sa'arot Ha-Amurot Be-Parah U-Ve-Nega'im: Consistency of 'Two Hairs' Across Halakha
Rabbi Yishmael: Hair Length Must Be Long Enough to Bend Over to Root (Kedei Lachof Roshan)
Rabbi Eliezer: Hair Only Needs to Be Pulled by Fingernail (Kedei Likrotz Be-Tziporen)
Rabbi Akiva: Hair Pullable with Tweezers (Kedei Nitalos Be-Zug)—Strictest Standard
Halakha Ke-Divrei Kulam Le-Hachmir: We Are Strict in All Cases (Lenient and Stringent)
Conclusion: End of Maturity Discussion; Return to Niddah Proper Tomorrow
